text: Fix publish workflow target resolution so actionable items are not skipped
description: Patched subdev/experience-mining/publish.ts to resolve publish targets per item and skip non-actionable records without consuming per-run limit. Added focused tests in publish.test.ts and re-ran weekly workflow checks.

reflections.context: Stabilize weekly Twitter/Instagram manual workflow support so a publish run always targets actionable items.
reflections.outcome: Added target-resolution logic in publish.ts, prevented non-actionable records from consuming run limit, and added publish target tests; weekly workflow and tests pass.
reflections.effectiveness: High for local reliability: behavior is deterministic and covered by focused tests.
reflections.lesson: When a workflow is partially manual and rate-limited, selection logic should be explicit and testable to avoid silent no-op runs.
reflections.pattern: Recurring pattern in this repo: small eligibility filters in orchestration scripts can block end-to-end outcomes unless directly unit-tested.

status.comment: Verified with node --import tsx --test workflow/weekly-manual.test.ts publish.test.ts (pass) and weekly-workflow.ts output.
